1010101010110010001111101101111100010000001100110011100110100100101 - ASI: 28

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  101 = 10 * 1
  110 = 1 * 10
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0010 = 00 * 10
  0101 = 0 * 101
  0110 = 0 * 110
  1110 = 11 * 10
  01100 = 0110 * 0
  10010 = 1 * 0010
  111110 = 11 * 1110
  1010101 = 101 * 0101
  00100000 = 0010 * 0000
  00111110 = 00 * 111110
  11100110 = 1110 * 0110
  010110010 = 0101 * 10010
  011001100 = 0110 * 01100
  100100101 = 10010 * 0101
  110111110 = 110 * 111110
  1010101010110010 = 1010101 * 010110010
  00100000011001100 = 00100000 * 011001100
  00111110110111110 = 00111110 * 110111110
  11100110100100101 = 11100110 * 100100101
  101010101011001000111110110111110 = 1010101010110010 * 00111110110111110
  0010000001100110011100110100100101 = 00100000011001100 * 11100110100100101
  1010101010110010001111101101111100010000001100110011100110100100101 = 101010101011001000111110110111110 * 0010000001100110011100110100100101
